title: TOURISM LEVY Education Instagram Post (6)
text:
What’s Changing?
ENVIRONMENTAL
TOURISM
SUSTAINABILITY
LEVY
UPDATE EFFECTIVE
1 JANUARY 2026
SMALL ACCOMMODATIONS ESTABLISMENT (1–24 ROOMS)
WILL NO LONGER BE REQURIED TO COLLECT AND PAY THE LEVY
TO SRC
S.I. 90 of 2025 - Environment Protection (Tourism
Environmental Sustainability Levy) (Amendment)
Regulations, 2025

Who Shall Still Collect the Levy?
TOURISM LEVY
RATES
Medium accommodation establishments (24–50 rooms): SCR 75
Large accommodation establishments (51+ rooms): SCR 100
Yachts & Island Resorts: SCR 100
Levy will remain applicable per person, per night
MEDIUM AND LARGE ACCOMMODATION
ESTABLISHMENTS, YACHTS, AND ISLAND RESORTS
WILL CONTINUE TO COLLECT THE TOURISM
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY LEVY AT
AFOREMENTIONED RATES.

Who’s exempted ?
LEVY
EXEMPTIONS
The levy is NOT applicable to:
Seychellois citizens
Resident persons
Airline & yacht crew
• Children aged 12 years & below

Important Notice for Taxpayers
LEVY FILING
REMINDER &
PAYMENT
Must be submitted by using the revised dedicated return
form
Must be filed and payed on or before the 21st of the
following applicable month
Late filing and payment of levy may result in penalties
TOURISM ACCOMMODATION ESTABLISHMENTS
REQUIRED TO COLLECT THE LEVY MUST FILE THEIR
RETURN AND PAY ON OR BEFORE THE 21ST OF THE
FOLLOWING APPLICABLE MONTH.

Need Help? Contact SRC
WE’RE HERE
TO HELP
Email: advisory.center@src.gov.sc
Phone: 429 3737
Forms available at SRC offices & online
FOR GUIDANCE OR CLARIFICATION ON THE TOURISM
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY LEVY, CONTACT
THE SEYCHELLES REVENUE COMMISSION ADVISORY
OFFICE
